purpose: Authorize the narrative graph reporter contract before executable implementation exists.

canonicalNodes.statement: The reporter requires source narrative, story packet, canonical spec, projection manifest, and lineage receipt inputs.
The reporter can render nodes that show the bounded lineage chain.
The reporter can render edges that show the bounded lineage chain.
The reporter can state that no runtime validation was run when operating in review mode.

rules.statement: No executable narrative graph reporter body may introduce behavior not named in story, canonical spec, schemas, and evidence expectations.
